summary_one_line: A coherent sfnt/OpenType font with valid cmap+GSUB tables so a decomposed mark b resolves to a real nominal glyph.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed OpenType/sfnt font (magic 00 01 00 00, table directory with valid 'cmap' and a GSUB/'GSUN'-tagged table) such that decompose() produces a secondary codepoint b whose nominal glyph lookup succeeds, taking the line-132 FALSE branch instead of the early return-0 TRUE branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds begin with the sfnt magic 00 01 00 00 and an identical table-directory prefix containing the literal ASCII 'cmap' tag at 0x0c and a 'GS..' table tag near 0x1b-0x1e (GSUN/GS.B), so font->get_nominal_glyph(b,...) returns true and the FALSE side at 132 is reached; winner hits the branch 39 times vs loser 0.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short, non-font byte salads (e.g. 13-byte and 27-byte inputs starting e0 17 / e0 e8 ff ff) lacking the sfnt magic and table directory, so either decompose() fails or b's nominal-glyph lookup fails, forcing the TRUE early-return side; loser hitcount on the branch is 0.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator absent in value_profile: cmplog records the per-execution CMP operand buffer and substitutes the runtime-observed magic/tag constants (the sfnt magic and the 4-byte table tags compared during table-directory parsing) directly into the input, synthesizing the structured font header that the value_profile loser, having only havoc/token mutation, cannot construct byte-by-byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The only decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with technique delta I2S.
The blocker is the false side of the get_nominal_glyph check on the decomposed codepoint b at line 132.
All winner-resolving seeds carry the sfnt magic 00 01 00 00 and the ASCII 'cmap' table tag.
Winner seeds contain a GSUN/GSUB-style 4-byte table tag in the table directory.
Loser-blocking seeds are short non-font byte salads without an sfnt header.
The winner reaches and resolves the branch while the loser never resolves it (winner hitcount 39, loser 0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=39  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator on top of havoc and tokens.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5675 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed ccf94a75d15faf4a` over a 38-level ancestor chain; observed the I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 37, i.e. an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile resolves the line-132 false branch as often as value_profile_cmplog despite the gating constant (sfnt magic + table tag) being many bytes wide, showing CMP_MAP gradient alone reconstructs the structured header without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The assumption that get_nominal_glyph succeeds specifically because of the cmap/GSUB tags rather than some other property of the larger winner seeds is inferred from the table-directory bytes, not directly observed at the glyph-lookup callsite.
